name: ElevenLabs
shortDescription: AI-powered voice synthesis and audio processing integration for ElevenLabs. Convert text to natural-sounding speech, generate sound effects, clone and design custom voices, and retrieve audio history — all with file storage and direct download URL support.

actions.name: Text to Speech
actions.description: Converts text to speech using ElevenLabs AI voice synthesis. Generates high-quality, natural-sounding audio from text input with customizable voice selection and model options. The audio file is saved to file storage and the file URL is returned.

actions.name: Get User Info
actions.description: Retrieves information about your ElevenLabs account including subscription tier, character quota, and usage statistics. Use this to monitor your API usage and remaining credits.

actions.name: Delete Voice
actions.description: Deletes a custom voice from your ElevenLabs account. Only custom voices you have created can be deleted. Pre-made voices cannot be removed. Use this to manage your voice library and stay within voice limits.

actions.name: Speech to Text
actions.description: Converts audio from a file URL to text transcription using ElevenLabs speech recognition. Supports multiple audio formats including MP3, WAV, and more.

actions.name: Text to Sound Effects
actions.description: Generates sound effects from text descriptions using ElevenLabs AI. Create realistic sound effects by describing what you want to hear.

actions.name: Get Voice
actions.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific voice including settings, metadata, and availability.

actions.name: Edit Voice
actions.description: Updates voice metadata including name, description, and labels. This endpoint uses multipart/form-data to modify voice properties. Only available for custom voices.

actions.name: Create Voice (Instant Clone)
actions.description: Creates an instant voice clone (IVC) from audio samples. Upload audio files to quickly create a custom voice. This method is faster than PVC but may have lower quality for some use cases.

actions.name: Create Voice (Professional)
actions.description: Creates a professional voice clone (PVC) with metadata only. Audio samples must be added separately using the Add Voice Samples endpoint. PVC offers higher quality than IVC.

actions.name: Add Voice Samples
actions.description: Adds audio samples to an existing professional voice clone (PVC). Multiple samples improve voice quality and consistency. Each sample should be clear audio of the target voice.

actions.name: Design Voice from Text
actions.description: Generates AI voice previews from a text description. Describe the voice characteristics you want and ElevenLabs will generate preview samples. You can then create an actual voice from your favorite preview.

actions.name: Create Voice from Generation
actions.description: Creates a usable voice from a generated preview. After using Design Voice to generate previews, use this to save your favorite preview as an actual voice you can use for text-to-speech.

actions.name: Get Models
actions.description: Retrieves a list of all available text-to-speech and speech-to-text models with their capabilities and supported languages.

actions.name: Get Voices
actions.description: Retrieves a list of all available voices in your account including pre-made and custom voices.

actions.name: Get History
actions.description: Retrieves the history of all text-to-speech generations made with your account. Results can be filtered and paginated.

actions.name: Get History Item Audio
actions.description: Downloads the audio file for a specific history item and saves it to file storage.

actions.name: Delete History Item
actions.description: Deletes a specific history item from your account. This removes the audio file and metadata permanently.

idealUseCases: Converting article or notification text into audio files for podcasts or voice alerts
Generating branded voice-overs using a cloned or custom-designed voice
Creating sound effects from text descriptions for media production pipelines
Retrieving and archiving audio history items from ElevenLabs to external storage
Building multilingual audio content pipelines with model selection
agentIdeas: When a **Google Sheets** "On New Row" trigger fires with a script column, use **ElevenLabs** "Text to Speech" to generate audio and store the returned URL back in the sheet with "Update Cell"
Use **ElevenLabs** "Design Voice from Text" to prototype a brand voice, then pass the resulting voice ID to "Text to Speech" for bulk audio generation across a content library
Combine **ElevenLabs** "Speech to Text" with **Brevo** "Send Transactional Email" to transcribe an audio file and email the transcript to stakeholders
